prompt: Edit Image 1: Apply the light theme and pink accent colors from the user interface in Image 2 to the configuration panel and preview elements of Image 1, changing its dark theme.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1: Apply the overall light theme and specific pink accent colors from the user interface in Image 2 to transform Image 1's dark theme. Change the dark background of the left configuration panel, the top navigation bar, and the main content area (including the individual Instagram post cards) to a light or white background. Update all text, icons, and non-accent UI elements from white to dark gray or black for readability on the new light theme. Additionally, convert the primary accent elements, such as the 'Add to website for free' button in the bottom left and the progress bar below the Instagram posts, to the prominent pink color observed in Image 2.
objects: Left configuration panel with light background
Top navigation bar with light background
Main content area with light background
Instagram post cards with light backgrounds
Pink 'Add to website for free' button
Pink progress bar below Instagram posts
UI elements (e.g., scrollbars, separators) in dark gray or black
